hooks.command: model="${CLAUDE_MODEL:-unknown}"; if [[ "$model" != *"opus"* ]]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"[Model nudge] Using $model, not claude-opus-4-7. For complex engineering/game-studio tasks (CLAUDE.md), Opus reasons significantly better — switch with /model.\"}"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ] && exit 0; TRANSCRIPT=$(find "$HOME/.claude/projects" -name "${SESSION_ID}.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && exit 0; TURN_COUNT=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$TURN_COUNT" -gt 40 ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"[Session nudge] $TURN_COUNT assistant turns — session is getting long. Run /compact to preserve context (CLAUDE.md §4).\"}"; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ] && exit 0; TRANSCRIPT=$(find "$HOME/.claude/projects" -name "${SESSION_ID}.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && exit 0; TURN_COUNT=$(grep -c '"role":"assistant"' "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); MODE="${CLAUDE_CODE_DEFAULT_MODE:-}"; [ "$TURN_COUNT" -gt 5 ] && [ "$MODE" != "plan" ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"[Plan nudge] $TURN_COUNT turns in, not in plan mode — for multi-step tasks, /plan first (CLAUDE.md §4 Goal-Driven Execution).\"}"; exit 0
